title: Create production-grade backend skeleton
acceptance_criteria: backend structure exists and is coherent
imports are clean and runnable
no unnecessary scaffolding beyond immediate need
notes: This task is about structure, not feature completeness.

title: Set up FastAPI application entrypoint
acceptance_criteria: application boots without errors
`GET /health` returns `200 OK`
local startup command is documented in README if needed

title: Add environment and config management
acceptance_criteria: application reads config from environment
config usage is centralized
no secrets hardcoded in source

title: Add structured logging and correlation ID support
acceptance_criteria: logs are structured and readable
each request can be traced with a correlation ID
no excessive noisy logging

title: Add database setup and persistence base
acceptance_criteria: app can connect to PostgreSQL
schema creation/migration path is defined
DB wiring is testable and not mixed into route handlers

title: Create initial persistence models
acceptance_criteria: trade and idempotency persistence models exist
schema supports the first submission slice
migrations/schema creation works locally

phase: Phase 3 — First vertical slice: trade submission
title: Add trade submission request/response contracts
acceptance_criteria: request contract is explicit
invalid payloads return clean validation errors
response shape is stable and documented in code

phase: Phase 3 — First vertical slice: trade submission
title: Implement domain model for Trade
acceptance_criteria: domain rules are explicit and testable
trade invariants are not embedded only in route handlers
code is easy to explain in interview discussion

phase: Phase 3 — First vertical slice: trade submission
title: Implement `POST /api/v1/trades`
acceptance_criteria: valid request creates trade successfully
endpoint is thin and delegates business logic
API behavior matches docs for implemented scope

phase: Phase 3 — First vertical slice: trade submission
title: Implement idempotency key handling
acceptance_criteria: duplicate identical submission does not create a second trade
mismatched payload with reused key returns conflict
idempotency logic is deterministic and tested

phase: Phase 3 — First vertical slice: trade submission
title: Add `GET /api/v1/trades/{tradeId}`
acceptance_criteria: existing trade can be retrieved
unknown trade returns `404`
response is stable and clear

title: Add unit tests for trade validation
acceptance_criteria: core trade rules are covered by unit tests
failing cases are explicit and readable

title: Add unit tests for idempotency logic
acceptance_criteria: idempotency behavior is covered by focused tests
tests are not coupled to HTTP layer unnecessarily

title: Add integration test for successful trade submission
acceptance_criteria: integration test passes locally
first vertical slice is proven end-to-end

title: Add broker wiring and local infrastructure support
acceptance_criteria: broker can be reached in local dev setup
no business messaging logic is prematurely scattered

title: Create outbox persistence model
acceptance_criteria: outbox can persist pending domain events
schema is simple and reliable

title: Persist `TradeAccepted` outbox event during submission
acceptance_criteria: trade + outbox record are created together
no broker publish required yet to complete task

title: Build outbox publisher process
acceptance_criteria: pending outbox events are published successfully
outbox records reflect dispatch state
failure behavior is safe and observable

title: Create message envelope standard
acceptance_criteria: envelope is explicit and reusable
logs and consumers can trace message lineage

title: Build settlement worker skeleton
acceptance_criteria: worker starts locally
worker receives and parses messages
worker structure is ready for settlement logic

title: Implement settlement workflow state transitions
acceptance_criteria: settlement transitions are explicit
invalid transitions are rejected safely
logic is testable outside transport layer

title: Record settlement attempts
acceptance_criteria: each processing attempt is auditable
success/failure is visible historically

title: Implement transient vs terminal failure classification
acceptance_criteria: classification logic exists in one clear place
worker behavior can branch correctly on failure type

title: Implement retry policy
acceptance_criteria: retryable failures are retried deterministically
retries are bounded
retry metadata is observable

title: Add DLQ routing
acceptance_criteria: poison/unrecoverable messages do not loop forever
DLQ records are diagnosable

title: Persist DLQ diagnostics
acceptance_criteria: DLQ diagnostics are queryable
failures can be reviewed without reading raw logs only

title: Implement DLQ replay path
acceptance_criteria: replay is explicit, not automatic
replay activity is recorded
successful replay path can be demonstrated

title: Add audit trail for key lifecycle events
acceptance_criteria: key lifecycle events are auditable
timeline reconstruction is possible

title: Add health/readiness checks
acceptance_criteria: local operators can quickly see system status
checks are useful and not misleading

title: Add operational metrics/logging improvements
acceptance_criteria: major operational flows are observable
logs/metrics support demo and interview discussion

phase: Phase 10 — Testing for async and resilience
title: Add unit tests for settlement state transitions
acceptance_criteria: settlement transition logic is well covered

phase: Phase 10 — Testing for async and resilience
title: Add integration test for outbox publishing
acceptance_criteria: outbox flow is proven in integration tests

phase: Phase 10 — Testing for async and resilience
title: Add integration test for worker success path
acceptance_criteria: happy-path async flow works end-to-end

phase: Phase 10 — Testing for async and resilience
title: Add integration test for retry path
acceptance_criteria: retry flow is deterministic and proven

phase: Phase 10 — Testing for async and resilience
title: Add integration test for DLQ path
acceptance_criteria: DLQ path is proven end-to-end

phase: Phase 10 — Testing for async and resilience
title: Add integration test for replay path
acceptance_criteria: replay scenario is demonstrated and testable

title: Add Docker Compose for full local stack
acceptance_criteria: local stack starts reliably
project is demoable on one machine

title: Add sample seed/demo scenarios
acceptance_criteria: recruiter/interviewer demo flow is easy to execute

title: Add architecture diagrams and final doc alignment
acceptance_criteria: docs reflect reality
architecture is easy to explain visually

title: Add CI pipeline
acceptance_criteria: repo has automated quality gate
core checks run consistently

title: Prepare recruiter-friendly walkthrough
acceptance_criteria: repo clearly signals senior engineering value
a reviewer can understand the project quickly
